drawn.ability: Crib slot generates +1 token even when empty

data.reasoning: Greedy evaluates: Adopt Bonsly (4-icon, 4 rep evolved) vs buy market card vs just tuck. Adopting gives future rep opportunity = highest immediate value.
data.evolution: Bonsly evolves to Sudowoodo on Day 1! Rep +4. P1 rep: 4.
data.note: Greedy maximizes immediate payoff: tucks all 5 hand cards optimally to evolve Bonsly same turn. 4-icon baby evolved in 1 turn using 3 Gentle Touch as wild + Berry Snack. Greedy is very efficient.

drawn.ability: Nurture Burst threshold reduced to 2 for Medicine

data.hand: 1 Rattle Toy, 1 Berry Snack, 3 Gentle Touch
data.reasoning: Greedy P2: Adopt Tyrogue (4-icon, 4 rep). Tuck as many matching icons as possible.
data.evolution: Tyrogue evolves to Hitmonchan on Day 1! Rep +4. P2 rep: 4.
data.note: Both Greedy players evolved on Day 1! Same pattern: 3 Gentle Touch wild + 1-2 typed cards covers 4-icon babies easily.

day2_P1.hand: 3 Gentle Touch, 1 Soothing Lullaby, 1 Berry Snack (reshuffle)
day2_P1.actions: Adopt Magby from meadow. Tuck: Gentle Touch (Medicine), Gentle Touch (Medicine), Gentle Touch (Medicine), Soothing Lullaby cannot provide Medicine so save. Actually: 3 Gentle Touch as Medicine = 3 Medicine. Need 1 Toy. Only Berry Snack and Soothing Lullaby left. Neither is Toy. Magby NOT evolved this turn. Progress: Medicine 3/3, Toy 0/1. Buy Poke Ball Rattle (1 token, tokensAfter 4). Buy Substitute Plush (3 tokens, tokensAfter 1).

day2_P2.hand: 2 Gentle Touch, 1 Berry Snack, 1 Soothing Lullaby, 1 Rattle Toy (reshuffle + Potion Drops)
day2_P2.correction: P2 deck after evolving: only 5 cards left (starting 10 - 4 tucked - 1 bought = 5 in deck/discard). Reshuffle gets 5 cards. Hand: varies.
day2_P2.actions: No baby in meadow (P1 took Magby). Buy Jigglypuff's Melody (2 tokens, tokensAfter 3). Buy Full Restore (2 tokens, tokensAfter 1). Deck building turn.

drawn.ability: +1 Berry icon to all Berry cards

day3_P1.hand: Poke Ball Rattle (new buy), Gentle Touch, Berry Snack, Soothing Lullaby, Potion Drops (bought earlier)
day3_P1.actions: Tuck Poke Ball Rattle under Magby (Toy 1). Magby evolves to Magmar! Rep +4. P1 rep: 8. Magmar ability: Facilities cost 1 less. Greedy immediately buys Berry Garden facility (normally 2, now 1 token). tokensAfter: 5. Adopt Budew from meadow. Tuck Berry Snack (Berry 1) + Soothing Lullaby (Song 1) under Budew. Budew at 1 Berry, 1 Song. Needs 1 more Berry.

day3_P2.hand: Full Restore, Jigglypuff's Melody, Gentle Touch, Potion Drops, Berry Snack
day3_P2.actions: No baby available in meadow. Greedy buys highest-value cards from market: Lullaby Chorus (3 tokens, 3 Song icons). Also buys Herbal Compress (2 tokens, Medicine+Berry, draw 1). tokensAfter: 0. Deck building.

drawn.ability: Once/Day: 1 Care Token = 1 Wild care icon

day4_P1.hand: Gentle Touch x3, Substitute Plush, Sitrus Berry (reshuffled larger deck)
day4_P1.actions: Tuck Gentle Touch (as Berry) under Budew. Budew evolves to Roselia! Rep +3. P1 rep: 11. P1 facilities: Berry Garden (+1 rep). Adopt Azurill from meadow (3-icon, easy). Tuck Substitute Plush under Azurill (3 Toy icons, Nurture Burst! bonus +1 Toy). But Azurill only needs 2 Toy + 1 Berry. Substitute Plush gives 3 Toy (overkill). Tuck Gentle Touch as Berry. Azurill evolves! Rep +3. P1 rep: 14. Buy Melody Room facility (2 tokens, normally 2, Magmar discount = 1). tokensAfter: 7.

day4_P2.hand: Lullaby Chorus, Gentle Touch x2, Rattle Toy, Herbal Compress
day4_P2.actions: Adopt baby from meadow (draw needed). Greedy wants highest immediate payoff.

drawn.ability: +1 Rep per evolution after this one

day4_P2_continued.hand: Lullaby Chorus, Gentle Touch x2, Rattle Toy, Herbal Compress
day4_P2_continued.actions: Greedy sees Togepi (5 rep, +1 per future evo - highest value baby). Adopt Togepi. Tuck Lullaby Chorus (3 Song, Nurture Burst! bonus icon). Tuck Rattle Toy (Toy 1). Tuck Gentle Touch (as Berry). Togepi needs Song 2, Berry 1, Toy 1. Has Song 3+burst, Toy 1, Berry 1. Evolves! Herbal Compress: buy or tuck? Save tokens.
day4_P2_continued.note: Greedy P2 evolves Togepi same-turn with Lullaby Chorus providing massive Song coverage + Nurture Burst. Togetic snowball now active for P2.

day5_P1.hand: Sitrus Berry, Gentle Touch x2, Poke Ball Rattle, Potion Drops
day5_P1.actions: Greedy: high income, lots of tokens. Adopt new baby from meadow. Buy high-value market cards. With Melody Room: draw 6 cards instead of 5.

day5_P2.hand: Full Restore, Jigglypuff's Melody, Berry Snack, Potion Drops, Soothing Lullaby
day5_P2.actions: No baby available yet. Greedy buys best cards: Sitrus Berry (2), Healing Pulse (3). tokensAfter: 3. Deck building turn.

drawn.ability: Song cards cost 1 less to purchase

day5_P1_continued.hand: Sitrus Berry, Gentle Touch x2, Poke Ball Rattle, Potion Drops, Berry Snack (Melody Room +1 draw)
day5_P1_continued.actions: Adopt Igglybuff (3-icon, Berry 2 + Toy 1). Tuck Sitrus Berry (2 Berry). Tuck Poke Ball Rattle (1 Toy). Igglybuff evolves! Rep +3. P1 rep: 17. Buy Crib Expansion facility (3 tokens, Magmar discount = 2). Unlocks 4th crib. tokensAfter: 6.

day5_P2.hand: Healing Pulse, Sitrus Berry, Gentle Touch, Soothing Lullaby, Berry Snack
day5_P2.actions: No baby in meadow. Buy Lum Berry Feast (3 tokens). Buy Musical Mobile (2 tokens). tokensAfter: 3. Pure deck-building.

day6_P1.hand: Gentle Touch x3, Substitute Plush, Herbal Compress, Potion Drops (6 cards: Melody Room)
day6_P1.actions: Adopt Smoochum (3-icon, Medicine 2 + Song 1). Tuck Potion Drops (Medicine 1) + Gentle Touch (Medicine) + Gentle Touch (Song). Smoochum evolves! Rep +3. P1 rep: 20. Buy Healing Ward (3 tokens, Magmar discount = 2). tokensAfter: 6.
day6_P1.note: 8TH EVOLUTION triggers endgame! P1 has 6 evolutions, P2 has 2. Finish current Week + 1 final Week.

day6_P2.hand: Lullaby Chorus (bought), Musical Mobile, Full Restore, Jigglypuff's Melody, Gentle Touch
day6_P2.actions: Endgame triggered. P2 must maximize remaining turns. No meadow baby. Buy Pecha Berry Remedy (2). Buy Oran Berry (1). tokensAfter: 5.

day7_P1_finalWeek.hand: Berry Snack, Sitrus Berry, Soothing Lullaby, Poke Ball Rattle, Gentle Touch, Lum Berry Feast (6 cards Melody Room)
day7_P1_finalWeek.actions: Adopt Happiny from meadow (Berry 2, Song 1, Medicine 1 = 4 icons). Tuck Sitrus Berry (2 Berry) + Soothing Lullaby (Song 1) + Gentle Touch (Medicine). Happiny evolves to Chansey! Rep +5. P1 rep: 25. Buy Toy Workshop (3 tokens, Magmar = 2). tokensAfter: 6.

day7_P2_finalWeek.hand: Healing Pulse, Lum Berry Feast, Herbal Compress, Potion Drops, Oran Berry
day7_P2_finalWeek.actions: Adopt Pichu from meadow (Toy 2, Song 1 = 3 icons). Tuck Gentle Touch (Toy), Gentle Touch (Toy). Wait - hand doesn't have Gentle Touch. Potion Drops (Medicine, wrong type). Greedy: use tokens to buy Poke Ball Rattle from market. Actually hand is deck-built cards. Tuck: no Toy cards in hand. Buy Clefairy Doll (2 tokens) + Poke Ball Rattle (1 token). tokensAfter: 5. Pichu progress: 0/3.

day8_P1_finalWeek.hand: Herbal Compress, Gentle Touch x2, Potion Drops, Substitute Plush, Poke Ball Rattle (6 cards)
day8_P1_finalWeek.actions: Adopt Cleffa from meadow (Song 2, Medicine 1 = 3 icons). Tuck Gentle Touch (Song) + Gentle Touch (Song) + Potion Drops (Medicine). Cleffa evolves to Clefairy! Rep +3. P1 rep: 28. Buy cards for end. tokensAfter: 5.

day8_P2_finalWeek.hand: Poke Ball Rattle (bought), Clefairy Doll (bought), Soothing Lullaby, Berry Snack, Rattle Toy
day8_P2_finalWeek.actions: Tuck Poke Ball Rattle (Toy 1) + Rattle Toy (Toy 1) + Soothing Lullaby (Song 1) under Pichu. Pichu evolves to Pikachu! Rep +4 (+1 Togetic) = +5. P2 rep: 14. Also tuck Berry Snack somewhere. End of game.
